ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Continued To May-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mario Paolini for Lucy Zuurmond.

Mr. Paolini stated that he filed a petition for final distribution yesterday and that it is still pending the Court's e-file queue. Status on close of estate is continued to May 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
